name: Incredible Luxury Vietnam and Cambodia 2 Weeks
duration: Places:Hanoi - Halong Bay - Hoi An - Hue - Ho Chi Minh City - Cu Chi Tunnels - Mekong Delta - Can Tho - Siem Reap
highlights: Explore attractive places and hidden alleys in every corner of Hanoi Old Quarter as well as Hoi An Ancient Town
Visit natural landscapes in Halong Bay with an overnight luxury cruise
Learn about Vietnam’s rich history, from the days of Hue’s Imperial Emperors to French Indochina and on to the memorable Cu Chi Tunnels
Discover the highlighted Angkor temples and scenic Tonle Sap Lake in Siem Reap

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival - Welcome Dinner & Relaxation
itinerary.description:
Our tour guide will pick you up at Noi Bai International Airport and transfer you to the city's center for hotel check-in at around 14:00. (If you want an early check-in, there will be a surcharge.) The rest of the day is your leisure time. Evening

Celebrate the beginning of your Vietnam journey with a welcome dinner at a luxury local restaurant, where you’ll savor a selection of exquisite Vietnamese dishes in an elegant setting. After dinner, rejuvenate your body with a traditional Vietnamese or herbal massage, specially designed to help you recover from jet lag and fully relax for the days ...

itinerary.title: Hanoi Half-day City Tour - Michelin-Starred Lunch Experience
itinerary.description:
Depending on availability, you can choose the morning or the afternoon to start your half-day city tour by jeep. The itinerary might bring you to these famous attractions: 

The Temple of Literature, which was built in 1070 at the time of Emperor Ly Thanh Tong. It is the elite, mandarins, and nobles studied. The Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum to see the illustrious founding father of modern Vietnam lying in peace. This well-known site also has a unique pagoda in Vietnam, One Pillar Pagoda, which has a distinctive style that resembles a lotus blossoming from water

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay Overnight Luxury Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast at the hotel between 8:00 and 8:30 in the morning before being driven to the well-known Halong Bay in northern Vietnam. On the cruise, check-in time is from 11:30 to 12:00. You will be greeted by the friendly crew staff with a refreshing welcome drink and enjoy a mouthwatering seafood lunch prepared by skilled chefs while gazing out at hundreds of odd limestone islands and the lovely emerald lake. Afternoon and Evening

After lunch, you and your partner should sign up for the most interesting activities on the cruise, like kayaking, swimming, or being on tour across the...
itinerary.accommodation: On-board an overnight cruise in Halong Bay

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Hanoi - Fly to Da Nang - Hoi An
itinerary.description:
Your second day in Halong will start out fresh if you take a Tai Chi class before breakfast. (This activity may change on particular trips; ask our sales consultant for further information.)

Once there, you may explore one of the most stunning caves, such as Trung Trang Cave, Sung Sot Cave, Dark & Bright Cave, etc., which is the last destination on the agenda. On the way to the cruise's return to the main port, breakfast is served in the restaurant, so check out and head there. Disembark and catch a shuttle back to Hanoi around 11:30. Upon disembarkation, our driver will wait for your to tran...

itinerary.title: Hoi An Half-day City Tour
itinerary.description: Start your tour at Hoi An Market, where locals shop for fresh ingredients, street food, and daily essentials. It’s a lively spot to see how the community goes about their morning routines. Next, visit the Fujian Assembly Hall, where locals come to perform ancestor worship and maintain traditional rituals. Stop by Phung Hung Ancient House and Tan Ky Ancient House to see how merchant families used to live and manage their businesses. Continue to the Museum of Folk Culture, which displays traditional crafts, tools, and items used in everyday life, showing how people in Hoi An lived in the past

itinerary.title: Hoi An - Da Nang - Hue - Road transfer
itinerary.description: After breakfast, your private driver will pick you up at your hotel in Hoi An. Begin your scenic journey to Hue along the iconic Hai Van Pass - also known as the “Ocean Cloud Pass” - one of the most breathtaking coastal routes in Vietnam. Arrive in Hue, the former imperial capital of Vietnam. Check in to your hotel and enjoy the rest of the day at leisure to relax or explore the charming city at your own pace.

itinerary.title: Hue Half-day City Tour
itinerary.description: The second day in Hue should be spent to discover this ancient city. Let’s start with a visit to Thien Mu Pagoda, a famous Buddhism attraction located at the bank of the enchanting but peaceful Perfume River. Then pay a visit to the Imperial Citadel and the King's Palace. The last stop will be Dong Ba Market, the most prominent traditional trading place in Hue City and the adjacent provinces. You might have the chance to understand the daily business of local sellers as well as purchase some interesting souvenirs while walking through many kiosks

itinerary.title: Hue - Fly to Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.description: After having breakfast at the hotel, you will be picked up and transferred to the airport for the flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Enjoy the night in this vibrant city.
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Luxury Cu Chi Tunnels Speedboat (Join-in Tour)
itinerary.description: Around 7:30, our guide will meet you at the hotel and drive to the speedboat at Tan Cang Pier. Let’s begin a Cu Chi tunnels tour by speedboat this morning. On a deluxe speedboat, we will have a breakfast of pastries or sandwiches, fresh tropical fruits, and mineral water. You can take in the rustic forest landscape along the river's edge as the tour guide on board discusses the Cu Chi Tunnels' significance and history. Arrive in Cu Chi Tunnels, the vital "secret city" that served as a hiding spot, communication, and supply route, and housing for the Vietnamese during the war
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Mekong Delta - Cai Be - Tan Phong Island - Vinh Long
itinerary.description: This morning you will boat along the Cai Be River to have the best experiences and typical specialties in local traditional craft villages. You can taste rice paper, candy, or dried longan in the family factories. Then, it might take 5 minutes to go along the village road to where people have developed beekeeping, and you can drink honey tea while visiting many fruit gardens. Visitors will be introduced to how to keep bees for honey and enjoy honey tea. After that, you continue on the boat to get upstream, crossing the windy Tien River

itinerary.title: Can Tho - Cai Rang Floating Market
itinerary.description:
Morning

This morning, you will be cruising to the floating market in Can Tho, where you can feel amazed by the vibrant atmosphere and vendors' boats filled with local products. This can truly be a unique and unforgettable experience. After that, travelers can taste seasonal fruits right from the orchard, and might even get the chance to meet some friendly locals while you're at it. Have lunch at a local restaurant. Afternoon

Transfer to Ho Chi Minh City and spend the night in the hotel

itinerary.title: Flight to Siem Reap - Deluxe Dinner with Apsara Show
itinerary.description:
Morning

This morning, you will take a flight to Siem Reap, meet our guide at Borei Seang Nam station, and transfer to check-in at the hotel for a short rest. Evening

Being pick-up at your accommodation by tuk-tuk, you and your partner will have a deluxe dinner while enjoying an Apsara show, authentic folk art from Cambodia. Feast on a selection of Khmer food from the buffet dinner during the show, you can sample typical dishes, such as a classic Amok Cambodian curry and Khmer BBQ. International dishes are also available. And explore the myths of Hinduism and Buddhism that portray Apsaras as ...

itinerary.title: Explore Angkor Wat full day
itinerary.description:
Morning

Around 8:00, our guide will pick you up from your hotel and bring you to the Angkor temple complex. First, let’s come to the ancient capital of Angkor Thom. You can admire the South Gate, which features enormous statues showing the churning of an ocean of milk, the Elephant Terrace, the Terrace of the Leper King, etc. The most special attractions here are Ta Prohm, having 54 towers adorned with more than 200 smiling Avolokitesvara faces, and Bayon Temple, a stunning forest temple that has remained mostly unexplored since it was found and still exudes a lot of mystique. Afternoon

This...

itinerary.title: Floating Village Half Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

You will be picked up by our tour guide and vehicle from your hotel in Siem Reap, and proceed 55 kilometers southeast to Kompong Khleang, one of the biggest and least-visited towns on the Tonle Sap Lake. Here, we will tour the town's streets (during the dry season) or waterways (during the rainy season). As water laps the verandas during the rainy season, the homes appear to be floating. However, during the dry season, towering stilts are visible, making the homes appear like wooden skyscrapers. Then, we will examine the wall murals in one of the pagodas constructed on the site of an ...

itinerary.title: Siem Reap Departure
itinerary.description: After breakfast, you are free until being transferred to Siem Reap International Airport for boarding to the next destination.

included: Overnight in shared Twin/ Double  room with Air-condition (AC) at hotel.
All transport during tour on air - conditioned vehicle as per itinerary (including airport pick up & see off)
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Meals as indicated in the program
2 domestic flights and 01 international flight Hanoi - Da Nang, Hue – Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh - Siem Reap  (Economy class with 20 kg luggage included)
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
